frame_analyses.description: Green background visible with laparoscopic instruments positioned above working area
Hand demonstrating backloading technique with needle driver and suture
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper backloading technique demonstrated - needle grasped at appropriate position

frame_analyses.description: Needle being positioned in needle driver with backloading method
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good needle orientation for subsequent placement

frame_analyses.description: Needle driver with loaded needle being introduced into working field
Needle driver approaching Penrose drain with visible marking line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Target identification clear - drain and marking visible

frame_analyses.description: Needle penetrating Penrose drain at first mark location
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Entry appears to be at appropriate location relative to mark

frame_analyses.description: Needle exiting drain and being grasped by second instrument
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean needle passage through drain, good instrument coordination

frame_analyses.description: Suture being pulled through drain creating second puncture point
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate suture advancement through both marks

frame_analyses.description: Suture ends being brought together extracorporeally for knot tying
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Both suture ends visible and accessible for knot formation

frame_analyses.description: Manual knot formation being performed outside the working field
Knot pusher being used to advance the formed knot down to tissue
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper knot pusher technique with controlled advancement

frame_analyses.description: Knot being secured at the tissue level with appropriate tension
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good knot positioning and tension application

frame_analyses.description: Scissors being used to trim suture tails
Final view showing completed suture with knot secured and tails trimmed

penalties.description: Slight deviation from optimal mark placement - estimated 1-2mm total

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of most phases, some uncertainty in precise deviation measurements due to camera angles during suture placement
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurements of suture deviation due to viewing angle limitations
technique_summary: Competent intermediate level performance with good technique throughout all phases. Total time of 102 seconds falls within intermediate range (100-200s).
strengths: Efficient knot pushing and cutting phases
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise suture placement at marks to minimize deviation penalties
Practice needle loading to reduce time in this phase
